generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService, DataLoggingService
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService, DataLoggingService
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoisting controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for container pickup"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SystemArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SwingAngleEncoder, AnemometerSensor, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for system services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker, Grafana, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HMI
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModel
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectory using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlan
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measurements with simulations and generates alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeAlert
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of data trends via Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTrendsVisualization
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLog
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for operator control and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlInterface
]

instance TrajectoryPlan : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory plan for crane movement"
]

instance RealTimeAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts generated when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance DataTrendsVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data trends and confidence bounds for operator decision-making"
]

instance OperatorControlInterface : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interface for operator control and configuration of the crane"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for validation"
]

instance HistoricalDataLog : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data log stored for analysis"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with physical crane motor controllers via a Python-based Physical Crane Interface for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with measurements and simulations compared in real-time by the Continuous Validation Service, and data logged continuously by the Logging Application."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) interact with digital services via MQTT and TimescaleDB, as visualized using C4 Model architecture with context and container diagrams showing high-level interactions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers both as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as-operated (real-time data logging and control) phases of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing values against predefined thresholds to ensure validity and trigger operator notifications when thresholds are breached."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto for inter-service communication; Python-based Physical Crane Interface for controller communication with the physical hardware."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Containerized services (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) deployed via Docker Compose on a single personal computer, with Python modules installed via pip for easy deployment."
]
